title: Kroki
description: Unified API that turns textual descriptions into diagrams (PlantUML, Mermaid, GraphViz, BPMN, C4, and many more).
installation: Kroki is a stateless rendering gateway and needs no database or persistent volume. The main yuzutech/kroki container renders most diagram types (PlantUML, GraphViz, C4, etc.) on its own. To enable Mermaid, BPMN and Excalidraw diagrams, deploy the optional companion containers (yuzutech/kroki-mermaid on :8002, yuzutech/kroki-bpmn on :8003, yuzutech/kroki-excalidraw on :8004) as separate apps and point the KROKI_*_HOST env vars at their in-cluster service names. The diagrams.net companion (yuzutech/kroki-diagramsnet) is experimental. Tune KROKI_MAX_URI_OPENING_COUNT / KROKI_MAX_URI_OPENING_TIMEOUT to harden against SSRF if exposing publicly.
